svg.title: MerchBench segment routing quadrants
svg.desc: Small-multiple 2x2 charts plotting model segment quality by economic burden.
svg.text: Each panel plots segment score against cost burden. Black rings mark economic picks; star labels mark quality leaders.
Crosshairs: score 7.0 proxy floor and cost-burden 7.5 premium boundary. Bubble size reflects response-token burden.
Pick: GPT-5 Mini | Leader: GPT-5 Mini
Pick: GPT-5 Mini | Leader: GPT-5 Mini
Pick: GPT-5.4 Mini | Leader: GPT-5 Mini
Black ring = economic pick; * = quality leader
